'''jozhazhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:staffable|staffable]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-zh-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:staffable|staffable]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| jozhazhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jozhazhithi|jozhazhithi]] || [[word:jozhazhiji|jozhazhiji]] || [[word:jozhazhishi|jozhazhishi]] || [[word:jozhazhiki|jozhazhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jozhazhuthuthu|jozhazhuthuthu]] || [[word:jozhazhujuju|jozhazhujuju]] || [[word:jozhazhushushu|jozhazhushushu]] || [[word:jozhazhukuku|jozhazhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jozhazhuthu|jozhazhuthu]] || [[word:jozhazhuju|jozhazhuju]] || [[word:jozhazhushu|jozhazhushu]] || [[word:jozhazhuku|jozhazhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jozhazhufthuf|jozhazhufthuf]] || [[word:jozhazhufjuf|jozhazhufjuf]] || [[word:jozhazhufshuf|jozhazhufshuf]] || [[word:jozhazhufkuf|jozhazhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jozhazhethe|jozhazhethe]] || [[word:jozhazheje|jozhazheje]] || [[word:jozhazheshe|jozhazheshe]] || [[word:jozhazheke|jozhazheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jozhazhothotho|jozhazhothotho]] || [[word:jozhazhojojo|jozhazhojojo]] || [[word:jozhazhoshosho|jozhazhoshosho]] || [[word:jozhazhokoko|jozhazhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jozhazhotho|jozhazhotho]] || [[word:jozhazhojo|jozhazhojo]] || [[word:jozhazhosho|jozhazhosho]] || [[word:jozhazhoko|jozhazhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jozhazhofthof|jozhazhofthof]] || [[word:jozhazhofjof|jozhazhofjof]] || [[word:jozhazhofshof|jozhazhofshof]] || [[word:jozhazhofkof|jozhazhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:jozhazhĂŻfthĂŻf|jozhazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:jozhazhĂŻfjĂŻf|jozhazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:jozhazhĂŻfshĂŻf|jozhazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:jozhazhĂŻfkĂŻf|jozhazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:jozhazhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|jozhazhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:jozhazhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|jozhazhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:jozhazhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|jozhazhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:jozhazhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|jozhazhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:jozhazhĂŻfthĂŻf|jozhazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:jozhazhĂŻfjĂŻf|jozhazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:jozhazhĂŻfshĂŻf|jozhazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:jozhazhĂŻfkĂŻf|jozhazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:jozhazhĂŻfthĂŻf|jozhazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:jozhazhĂŻfjĂŻf|jozhazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:jozhazhĂŻfshĂŻf|jozhazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:jozhazhĂŻfkĂŻf|jozhazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jozhazhĂŠthĂŠ|jozhazhĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:jozhazhĂŠjĂŠ|jozhazhĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:jozhazhĂŠshĂŠ|jozhazhĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:jozhazhĂŠkĂŠ|jozhazhĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jozhazhathatha|jozhazhathatha]] || [[word:jozhazhajaja|jozhazhajaja]] || [[word:jozhazhashasha|jozhazhashasha]] || [[word:jozhazhakaka|jozhazhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jozhazhatha|jozhazhatha]] || [[word:jozhazhaja|jozhazhaja]] || [[word:jozhazhasha|jozhazhasha]] || [[word:jozhazhaka|jozhazhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jozhazhafthaf|jozhazhafthaf]] || [[word:jozhazhafjaf|jozhazhafjaf]] || [[word:jozhazhafshaf|jozhazhafshaf]] || [[word:jozhazhafkaf|jozhazhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:jozhazhasha|jozhazhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:jozhazhshĂ«sha|jozhazhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jozhazhrosha|jozhazhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jozhazhmusha|jozhazhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:jozhazhyasha|jozhazhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojozhazhnkshĂ«sha|gojozhazhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojozhazhnkrosha|gojozhazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojozhazhnkmusha|gojozhazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojozhazhnkyasha|gojozhazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:jozhazhazhasha|jozhazhazhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jozhazhazhshĂ«sha|jozhazhazhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jozhazhazhrosha|jozhazhazhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jozhazhazhmusha|jozhazhazhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jozhazhazhyasha|jozhazhazhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojozhazhazhnkshĂ«sha|gojozhazhazhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojozhazhazhnkrosha|gojozhazhazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojozhazhazhnkmusha|gojozhazhazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojozhazhazhnkyasha|gojozhazhazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:jezhĂŠzhasha|jezhĂŠzhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jezhĂŠzhshĂ«sha|jezhĂŠzhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jezhĂŠzhrosha|jezhĂŠzhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jezhĂŠzhmusha|jezhĂŠzhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jezhĂŠzhyasha|jezhĂŠzhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojezhĂŠzhnkshĂ«sha|gojezhĂŠzhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojezhĂŠzhnkrosha|gojezhĂŠzhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojezhĂŠzhnkmusha|gojezhĂŠzhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojezhĂŠzhnkyasha|gojezhĂŠzhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:jozhfazhasha|jozhfazhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jozhfazhshĂ«sha|jozhfazhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jozhfazhrosha|jozhfazhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jozhfazhmusha|jozhfazhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jozhfazhyasha|jozhfazhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojozhfazhnkshĂ«sha|gojozhfazhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojozhfazhnkrosha|gojozhfazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojozhfazhnkmusha|gojozhfazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojozhfazhnkyasha|gojozhfazhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
